title: Minimum Elements to Add to Form a Given Sum
titleCn: 构成特定和需要添加的最少元素

testcases.input: nums = [1,-1,1], limit = 3, goal = -4 Output: 2 Explanation: You can add -2 and -3, then the sum of the array will be 1 - 1 + 1 - 2 - 3 = -4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: You can add -2 and -3, then the sum of the array will be 1 - 1 + 1 - 2 - 3 = -4.
